screen.joc.portable_throttle.hint: Click an inventory item, then click a frequency slot to set it
screen.joc.portable_typewriter.selected_: Click a Redstone Link to bind, or set frequency items above
screen.joc.portable_typewriter.click_hin: Click a key to select it for binding

screen.joc.seeker.no_waypoints: No waypoints found in Xaero's World Map
joc.configuration.title: Aeronautics: Joy of Creation Configs
joc.ponder.balloon.text_1: Balloons provide lift when attached to your airship structure.
joc.ponder.balloon.text_2: Multiple balloons generate more lift. Distribute them evenly across your structure.
joc.ponder.seeker.text_1: The Seeker tracks targets and emits redstone signals based on the direction to the target.
joc.ponder.seeker.text_2: Insert a Spyglass to track specific coordinates. The Seeker will emit a redstone signal toward the target.
joc.ponder.seeker.text_3: The nixie tubes now show the redstone signal strength, indicating the angle to the target.
joc.ponder.gyroscopic_seat.text_1: The Gyroscopic Seat prevents sublevel rotation for the rider, keeping your view stable.
joc.ponder.gyroscopic_seat.text_2: Right-click to sit. Your view remains stable even when the ship rotates around you.
joc.ponder.shatter_assembler.text_1: The Shatter Assembler disassembles and reassembles ships. It must face a solid block.
joc.ponder.shatter_assembler.text_2: Place it on a wall, floor, or ceiling. Right-click to open the interface and control assembly.
joc.ponder.cross_sail.text_1: Cross Sails generate lift and drag for airship movement. They come in 16 colors.
joc.ponder.cross_sail.text_2: Place them adjacent to form larger sail surfaces. Use dye to recolor connected sails.
joc.ponder.portable_typewriter.text_1: The Portable Typewriter binds keyboard keys to Redstone Link frequencies for wireless control.
joc.ponder.portable_typewriter.text_2: Right-click a Redstone Link while a key is selected to bind it. Press the key to activate the link.
joc.ponder.portable_throttle.text_1: The Portable Throttle is a wireless redstone signal transmitter for controlling your airship.
joc.ponder.portable_throttle.text_2: Right-click a Redstone Link to bind. Right-click air to configure the signal strength.
joc.ponder.tag.aeronautics.description: Components for airships and aeronautical contraptions
